title: Static public explorer over JSON-LD (no accounts/PII; every assertion shows its source)
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). A static, no-account public explorer presents the data with every assertion source-linked and no ranking/scorecard.
objective: Build a static public explorer over the JSON-LD exports with no accounts/PII, where every assertion shows its source and no ranking surface exists.
acceptanceCriteria: Static public explorer over the JSON-LD exports; no accounts, no PII collected.
Every displayed assertion shows its source (source-linked) with license/retrievedAt.
No ranking/scorecard surface (no-scorecard rule); read-only over published exports.
output: explorer/ static public explorer over the JSON-LD exports, committed via PR.
